title: Inheritance PASS: [107] QA_CORE_SPEC.v1 (kernel) → [108] QA_AREA_QUANTIZATION_CERT.v1 (family_extension)
_fixture_purpose: First certified inheritance edge in the QA spec graph. Proves that [108] QA Area Quantization is a well-formed kernel extension: (1) it correctly declares inherits_from='QA_CORE_SPEC.v1'; (2) its gate policy [0..5] is a superset of the kernel's; (3) its failure algebra extends the kernel's four types without deleting any; (4) its logging contract is compatible (move/fail_type/invariant_diff all present); (5) its generators preserve only invariants declared in the kernel (QA_relation_1, QA_relation_2); (6) the scope transition 'kernel → family_extension' is valid. This cert turns the statement '[108] extends [107]' from a validator convention into a certified edge in the QA spec graph.

validation_checks.description: parent family schema version is a recognised QA cert family
child family schema version is a recognised QA cert family
child gate policy is superset of parent gate policy
child failure algebra extends parent without deleting required types
validation_checks.details: parent={OUT_OF_BOUNDS,PARITY,INVARIANT_BREAK,ZERO_DENOMINATOR}; child adds QUADREA_MISMATCH,FORBIDDEN_QUADREA_INCORRECT; all parent types preserved

validation_checks.description: child logging contract includes move, fail_type, invariant_diff
child preserves_invariants refs resolve against parent invariant names
